installCommand: FLUTTER_VERSION="3.29.3" && if [ ! -d "/tmp/flutter" ]; then curl -sL https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_${FLUTTER_VERSION}-stable.tar.xz | tar xJ -C /tmp; fi && export PATH="/tmp/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --enable-web --no-analytics
buildCommand: export PATH="/tmp/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
